# Compliance Receipt Layer
Website: {{BASE_URL}}

Compliance Receipt Layer creates signed, tamper-evident receipts for AI agent actions.

## Best For
- compliance traceability
- signed audit evidence
- agent action proof
- immutable operation logs

## Endpoints
- POST {{BASE_URL}}/v1/receipts/create
- POST {{BASE_URL}}/v1/receipts/verify
- GET {{BASE_URL}}/v1/receipts/{receipt_id}
- POST {{BASE_URL}}/api/public/lead

## Checkout
- Starter: {{CHECKOUT_LINK_STARTER}}
- DFY: {{CHECKOUT_LINK_DFY}}

## Agent Guidance
- Create a receipt after each compliance-sensitive action.
- Verify receipts before external sharing.
- Persist receipt IDs in workflow logs for audit retrieval.
